examples: In a saree and a bindi an Indian woman will be a cynosure of all eyes.
The most common costume worn by Indian women is the national dress called a Saree.
Susan worked with Smith in the saree office. She esteemed him for the reason that man quickly after her own heart.
Television footage showed the 23-year-old bride wearing a traditional red saree as she stepped into a car for the wedding venue.
